payload.case_name: Anthropic v. Department of War et al

enrichment.summary: EFF filed an amicus brief in Anthropic v. Department of War et al., a case involving Anthropic and a federal government department. The raw text of the brief is not available beyond the title and document reference, so the specific arguments and legal positions advanced cannot be determined from the provided source text.

source_entity.name: Electronic Frontier Foundation
source_entity.description: Civil-liberties advocacy group. On AI: skeptical of both surveillance-AI and overbroad regulation that would burden open-source. Pro-fair-use in training-data debates; opposed many provisions of state deepfake laws on First Amendment grounds. Orthogonal to safety/x-risk camp.
